title: Church & Dwight: A Compounder In Action
text: In this article, I give a full view of Church & Dwight, a leading producer of consumer-packaged goods. The core of this article is to highlight the way Church & Dwight has achieved great compounding results through its business model.

title: Church & Dwight Webcasts Presentation at the 2022 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference
text: EWING, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) will present at the 2022 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Tuesday, September 6, 2022 at 12:45 p.m. ET. A link to the broadcast will be provided through the Investors section of Church & Dwight's website at http://investor.churchdwight.com/investors/news-events. title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Looks Troubled: Cost Inflation Key Worry
text: Church & Dwight (CHD) is battling increased raw material, manufacturing and distribution costs. It expects to witness additional cost inflation of $135 million in 2022.

title: Here's Why Church & Dwight Stock Could Dip Even Lower
text: Household product name Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) is rolling over from a small bear flag, though its shares are failing at the 100-day moving average, which has been a significant trendline for the stock's 10-year bull rally.
